stemHtml: While descending through FL260, ATC clears the aircraft to 2000 ft. When should the altimeter setting be changed?

options.a: Set to local QNH when passing the transition level.
options.b: Set to QNH immediately while under ATC control.
options.c: Set to local QNH when passing the transition altitude.
options.d: Keep QNH until passing the transition level.
